/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/tuner_plugin.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libtuner_plugin.so -o libtuner_plugin.so CMakeFiles/tuner_plugin.dir/tuner_plugin_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tuner_plugin.dir/tuner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tuner_plugin.dir/tuner_plugin.cpp.o  ../../src/libopenamp-dsp.a
